description: Repository-scan retrieval hints for the 55 race_condition_in_async_code subpatterns. Use this file to build a candidate set before applying the verdict-layer subpattern JSON files.

defaults.group_match_semantics: For grep_keywords_all_groups, every group should match at least one keyword before the candidate is treated as high-priority.
defaults.any_match_semantics: grep_keywords_any is only for weak recall and should not be used alone for risk judgment.
defaults.exclude_semantics: grep_keywords_exclude are soft down-rank hints by default unless the caller explicitly chooses hard exclusions.
defaults.rg_template_semantics: For full-repo historical scanning, run fallback_no_path first. broad_recall is an optional path-prioritized fast path. Use group_intersection only for coarse filtering after recall.
defaults.path_globs_semantics: path_globs are soft search-priority hints, not hard absence proofs. If broad_recall is empty or implausibly sparse, rerun fallback_no_path before concluding the pattern is absent.
